CustomField.description: Score based on Billing Reengaged Date and Billing Onboarding Status.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Score based on Billing Reengaged Date and Billing Onboarding Status - if Billing Onboarding Status is not Opted Out and Billing Reengaged Date is within the last 30 days, score bumps up to 35. Otherwise, score = 0.
CustomField.label: Billing Reengaged Score
